zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha von Groitzsch Margravine of Groitzsch and Wettin於1095年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 古本格洛其時，她的父親Wiprecht I von Groitzsch Markgraf25歲，母親n.n.25歲。她和Dedo IV von Wettin至少有1個女兒。她去世於1144年5月16日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特薩阿爾可萊斯維廷享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha von Groitzsch Margravine of Groitzsch and Wettin于1095年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 古本格洛其时，她的父亲Wiprecht I von Groitzsch Markgraf25岁，母亲n.n.25岁。她和Dedo IV von Wettin至少有1个女儿。她去世于1144年5月16日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特薩阿爾可萊斯維廷享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha von Groitzsch Margravine of Groitzsch and Wettin was born in 1095, in Grötzsch, Guben, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany, her father, Wiprecht I von Groitzsch Markgraf, was 25 and her mother, n.n., was 25. She had at least 1 daughter with Dedo IV von Wettin. She died on 16 May 1144, in Wettin, Saalkreis, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 49.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Dedo IV von Wettin. Elle est décédée le 16 mai 1144, à Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha von Groitzsch Margravine of Groitzsch and Wettin è nata il nel 1095 nel Grötzsch, Kreis Guben, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Wiprecht I von Groitzsch Markgraf, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, n.n., aveva 25 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Bertha von Groitzsch Margravine of Groitzsch and Wettin(이)가 1095년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 구벤 그o츠슈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wiprecht I von Groitzsch Markgraf(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 n.n.(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Dedo IV von Wettin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1144년 5월 16일 독일 작센-아할트 사알크레이스 w틴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha von Groitzsch Margravine of Groitzsch and Wettin родилась в 1095 г. в местности грoцщ, крис губен, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Wiprecht I von Groitzsch Markgraf было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали n.n., 25. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Dedo IV von Wettin. Она умерла 16 мая 1144 г. в местности веттинь, саалкрис, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 49 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Dedo IV von Wettin. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1144, en Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 49 años.
